name: Bacon & Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until almost crisp. Remove from heat and drain on a paper towel.
2. Add butter and olive oil to the pan over medium heat.
3. Add the onion and garlic, sauté for 2-3 minutes until softened.
4. Add the green pepper and red pepper; cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the chopped tomatoes and white wine. Cook for 15 minutes.
6. Remove the hot pepper before serving.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve over pasta.
